pages.title: Subscription Terms
pages.content:
Effective Date: January 1, 2024

These Subscription Terms govern the use of subscription-based services offered by Example Corp. By subscribing, you agree to these terms.

1. Subscription Plans
We offer standard and premium subscription plans. The standard plan is billed monthly or annually.

2. Cancellation Policy
You may cancel your subscription at any time. For standard subscriptions, the cancellation deadline is 30 days before the next billing date. To cancel, you must submit a written cancellation request via email to support@example.com or through your account dashboard. If you cancel less than 30 days before the next billing date, the cancellation will take effect at the end of the following billing cycle, and you will be charged for one additional cycle.

3. Refunds
Refunds are issued only if cancellation is requested within 14 days of the initial purchase for new subscribers. Renewal payments are non-refundable.

4. Automatic Renewal
All subscriptions automatically renew unless canceled before the renewal date as described in Section 2.

For questions, contact support@example.com.
